name: v0.2 adversarial: oscillation / threshold-hopping (20+ cycles)
description: Stress test for trigger/decay stability under oscillating drift signals. Designed to repeatedly flirt with the incTwoCycles trigger and the decTwoCycles decay without any component hitting 3.

notes: - repeated two-step ramps (to test incTwoCycles triggering)
- repeated two-step calm periods (to test decTwoCycles decay)
- small oscillations (to test streak reset behavior)
No component reaches 3; any repair entry should come from rho_sum_increased_two_cycles, not any-hit-3.
Use this fixture to compare TS vs Python parity on: escalationLevel, action selection, and choreography step progression.
